title: Typhoon Bavi weakens to tropical storm as it slams into eastern China
description: Storm the size of France expected to bring days of heavy rains and strong winds to eastern and northern provinces.
content:
Tropical Storm Bavi has slammed into eastern China and, despite weakening from a typhoon, has brought heavy rain and violent winds after authorities evacuated nearly two million people.
Bavi is the … [+1584 chars]
de: Der Taifun Bavi schwächt sich zu einem tropischen Sturm ab, als er auf Ostchina trifft. Ein Sturm von der Größe Frankreichs wird voraussichtlich tagelang starke Regenfälle und starke Winde in die östlichen und nördlichen Provinzen bringen.
en: Typhoon Bavi weakens to tropical storm as it slams into eastern China. Storm the size of France expected to bring days of heavy rains and strong winds to eastern and northern provinces.
la: Typhoon Bavi tempestatem tropicam debilitat, ut eam in Sinas Orientales impellit. Tempestas magnitudine Franciae expectat ut dies imbribus et ventis validis in provincias Orientales et Septentrionales perducantur.
